name: Yoco
description: Yoco — South Africa SMB payment platform with card readers, online checkout, and business bank account for local merchants.

seo.title: Yoco — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Yoco: Yoco — South Africa SMB payment platform with card readers, online checkout, and business bank account for local merchants.

when_to_use: Card reader POS deployment for South African SMB merchants
Online checkout integration for South African e-commerce
Business bank account + payments stack for SA small businesses

pros: Strong South African SMB brand and support
Card reader, online, and banking combined
cons: Developer APIs secondary to hardware product
Hardware cost upfront for card reader
review.verdict: The default SMB payments brand in South Africa — practical, local, and not trying to be developer-first.
review.best_for: South African small businesses needing card reader plus simple online acceptance
review.not_for: Non-SA merchants or teams needing rich API-first integration
